name: CKM Applied Materials Corp.
summary: CKM Applied Materials Corp. develops metal building materials in Taiwan. The company offers ceiling suspension systems, such as exposed T grids and partition frame systems; metal ceilings, including flat, perforated, embossed, mesh, baffle, curve, linear grid, honeycomb, extrusion, crossing, triangular, strip, and cell ceilings; and micro-perforated acoustical panels. Its products are used in governmental buildings, hospitals, schools, department stores, hotels, factories, public and residential buildings, and commercial buildings. The company was formerly known as CKM Building Material Corp. and changed its name to CKM Applied Materials Corp. in July 2017. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Tainan city, Taiwan.
